commands: sed -n on prior-agent instructions and prior-audit skill
python -m json.tool on required upstream handoff JSONs
python consistency validation for prior audit CSV/JSON
warnings: Audit-only pass; no new physics calculations, FOPT scans, PTA scans, or PTArcade runs performed.
Final interpretation is limited by missing thermal-history, abundance, self-interaction, and template-validity calculations.
Constraint no-exclusion result should not be read as a positive viability proof.
approximations: Audit severity and controlled flags are expert classifications based on upstream handoff content.

upstream_statuses.note: Authoritative model usable with literature, portal, and backend caveats.
Exact model already studied; benchmark conventions require care.
No red flags, but same-model precedent and convention/backend caveats.
Usable scan with semianalytic and percolation approximations.
DBF/template/large-alpha and prior-boundary caveats; no 14/14 benchmark.
No exclusions claimed because most required observables are missing.

assumptions.description: Exact core classically conformal SU(2)_D doublet model was already studied for NANOGrav 12.5-year FOPT interpretation in arXiv:2109.11558; model-level novelty is low.
assumptions.required_solution: Compare only as updated/recomputed PTA likelihood result, not as a new model claim.

assumptions.description: Minimal model fixes Higgs portal coupling to zero and treats the dark sector as secluded.
assumptions.required_solution: Specify a thermal origin or nonzero portal extension, or state that portal searches and thermal-SM constraints are not directly testable.

assumptions.description: No thermal history, dark-sector temperature ratio, decoupling history, reheating partition, relic abundance, or entropy transfer observable was computed.
assumptions.required_solution: Implement thermal_history.py/cosmo_constraints.py with T_dark/T_SM, entropy evolution, FOPT energy partition, and BBN/CMB likelihood mapping.

source.note: Constraint stage requires new backend for core cosmological observables.

assumptions.description: No relic abundance or fractional dark-vector DM abundance was computed, so vector-DM claims and self-interaction bounds cannot be applied.
assumptions.required_solution: Compute Omega_WD/Omega_DM for the assumed thermal/nonthermal history and document whether W_D is stable and cosmologically relevant.

assumptions.description: No non-Abelian vector self-interaction transfer or viscosity cross section sigma/m(v) was computed.
assumptions.required_solution: Implement self_interactions.py for dwarf, Milky Way, and cluster velocities with unit conversion and transfer/viscosity convention.

source.note: Mass and coupling alone cannot test SIDM bounds.

assumptions.description: FOPT calculation uses a semianalytic conformal high-temperature/polynomial backend with Gaussian percolation approximation.
assumptions.required_solution: Cross-check selected benchmarks with a full finite-temperature effective-potential/bounce calculation and alternate percolation criteria.

assumptions.description: Single-field Coleman-Weinberg radial background is assumed; portal, dark fermions, extra scalars, daisy thermal-mass scans, and RG-running scans are omitted.
assumptions.required_solution: Add controlled variations for portal, extra matter, RG scale, and thermal-mass prescriptions if making robustness claims.

assumptions.description: PTA analysis uses DBF template for very large-alpha points; wall velocity and microscopic efficiency are not independently computed.
assumptions.required_solution: Compute or marginalize wall velocity and efficiency, compare DBF/BF/Higgsless templates only within documented validity domains.

source.note: DBF selected by regime with explicit validity warning.

assumptions.description: No perfect 14/14 PTA violin benchmark was found; best direct scan benchmark reaches 13/14 bins.
assumptions.required_solution: Report as near-match only and avoid claiming all violin bins are covered by a direct benchmark.

assumptions.description: Initial PTArcade final run hit the upper log10_vD prior boundary and was rerun with a wider prior; posterior boundary sensitivity remains a required caveat.
assumptions.required_solution: Inspect final chains for boundary contact, rerun with still-wider/alternative priors if posterior support approaches limits.

source.note: Archived prior-boundary chain and widened-prior rerun documented.

assumptions.description: Final PTArcade MAP has extremely large alpha and f_peak_est above nominal PTA steering band; f_peak_est is approximate while DBF spectrum is fitted.
assumptions.required_solution: Assess MAP validity using full spectrum, template domain, and prior-boundary diagnostics rather than f_peak_est alone.

assumptions.description: Constraint stage claims no exclusions mainly because required cosmological, portal, abundance, and self-interaction observables are missing.
assumptions.required_solution: Phrase constraint result as unconstrained/not testable with current observables, not as physically allowed.

source.note: Only one direct theory check; seven constraints require new backend.

assumptions.description: Sub-GeV strongly supercooled FOPT can affect BBN/CMB through energy release or dark radiation, but visible/dark reheating and Delta N_eff are not mapped.
assumptions.required_solution: Compute dark radiation, entropy injection, and BBN/CMB likelihood for the fitted posterior region.

source.note: Core cosmological constraints require thermal history.

assumptions.description: Pipeline adopts m_WD(chi)=gD*chi/2 despite a convention tension in arXiv:2109.11558.
assumptions.required_solution: Keep the critic-authoritative convention in all local code and avoid directly importing same-paper benchmark masses without conversion.

assumptions.description: Perturbative finite-temperature effective potential in conformal models has gauge/daisy/RG prescription dependence not quantified by the scan.
assumptions.required_solution: Run gauge/prescription/RG-scale variations or use gauge-invariant diagnostics where possible.

source.note: Gauge dependence and daisy prescription flagged upstream.

assumptions.description: FOPT and PTA scans use finite chosen ranges for gD and vD; conclusions are conditional on these prior/range choices.
assumptions.required_solution: State all ranges and rerun boundary expansions when best points or posterior mass approach limits.

source.note: FOPT gD [0.25,3.2], vD [1e-5,0.8] GeV; PTA priors differ.

assumptions.description: PTArcade evidence is null in the handoff, so model comparison against alternatives is not available.
assumptions.required_solution: Compute evidence with controlled error or restrict claims to posterior fit quality.

assumptions.description: Portal-based collider, direct-detection, and beam-dump constraints are not applicable only under the exact zero-portal minimal assumption; any portal extension reopens them.
assumptions.required_solution: Maintain a separate constraint recast for nonzero portal variants.

required_followups.description: Build thermal-history and BBN/CMB observable backend for T_dark/T_SM, entropy transfer, reheating partition, Delta N_eff, and energy injection.
required_followups.suggested_action: Implement thermal_history.py and cosmo_constraints.py, then rerun constraint-agent.

required_followups.description: Compute relic abundance or dark-vector fractional abundance and non-Abelian self-interaction cross sections.
required_followups.suggested_action: Implement relic_density.py and self_interactions.py before making dark-matter viability claims.

required_followups.description: Assess GW template validity for extremely large alpha and independently determine or marginalize wall velocity and efficiency.
required_followups.suggested_action: Compare DBF/BF/Higgsless where valid and add wall-dynamics nuisance parameters or calculations.

required_followups.description: Audit final PTArcade posterior boundary behavior and prior sensitivity after the widened-prior rerun.
required_followups.suggested_action: Inspect chain extrema and repeat with alternate priors if support remains close to boundaries.

required_followups.description: Quantify effective-potential gauge, daisy, and RG prescription uncertainty for representative posterior and benchmark points.
required_followups.suggested_action: Run controlled theory-validity variations or full bounce cross-checks.
